ideVersions.vsCodeDevKit: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

validationCommandOrManualSteps: pwsh -NoProfile -File jobs/ide-parity-version-revalidation.ps1; exit code 0 = pins in range, 1 = drift detected (dry-run artifact written or live GitHub issue created). Required env vars (optional, validated only when set): FRONTCOMPOSER_IDE_VERSION_VISUALSTUDIO, FRONTCOMPOSER_IDE_VERSION_RIDER, FRONTCOMPOSER_DOTNET_SDK_VERSION.
revalidationTrigger: Configured IDE, extension, or .NET SDK version exits pinned range.
